# Vertex Living

> Premium Real Estate in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR, India

Vertex Living is a trusted real estate company based in Gurgaon (Gurugram), Haryana, India. We specialize in buying, selling, and renting luxury residential and commercial properties across Gurgaon and Delhi NCR.

## Who We Are

- Company: Vertex Living
- Type: Real Estate Agency (RealEstateAgent)
- Location: DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon – 122002, Haryana, India
- Phone: +91 98765 43210
- Email: info@vertexliving.in
- Website: https://vertexliving.in
- Founded: 2009
- Certifications: RERA Registered, ISO Certified

## Services

- Buy Property in Gurgaon (luxury 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK apartments, villas, penthouses)
- Rent Property in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR
- Sell Property (valuation, marketing, legal support)
- New Launch Projects (exclusive access to developer launches)
- Property Investment Advisory (12% annual appreciation history)
- NRI Property Services

## Areas Covered

- Golf Course Road (Sector 42, 43) – Ultra luxury
- Golf Course Extension Road (Sectors 57, 65, 66, 67) – Premium luxury
- Sohna Road (Sector 49) – Mid to premium
- New Gurgaon (Sectors 82–103) – Affordable luxury with high appreciation
- DLF City, Cyber City, MG Road – Commercial & mixed use
- Delhi, Noida, Faridabad – Extended NCR coverage

## Key Facts

- 36+ RERA-verified properties in portfolio
- ₹5,000 Crore+ in managed real estate
- 12% average annual capital appreciation
- 15+ years of market expertise
- Top developers: DLF, M3M, IREO, Godrej, Sobha, Signature Global
